nasb.text: They lived in Gilead, in Bashan and in its towns, and in all the pasture lands of Sharon, as far as their borders.

esv.text: and they lived in Gilead, in Bashan and in its towns, and in all the pasturelands of Sharon to their limits.

cnv.text: 他們住在基列、巴珊和屬於巴珊的村莊，以及沙崙的整個草場，直到四周的邊緣。

ccb.text: 他们住在基列、巴珊和巴珊附近的乡村以及沙仑所有的草原，直到四围的边界地带。
